title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 106.
content:
There was an old Person of Burton,
    Whose answers were rather uncertain;
    When they said, "How d'ye do?"
    He replied, "Who are you?"
    That distressing old person of Burton.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 106.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
